import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut neg = false
      if b == 45
        neg = true
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut reading = true
      while i < n and reading
        let d = match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if d >= 48 and d <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (d - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          reading = false
        end
      end
      if neg
        val = -val
      end
      result = list.push(result, val)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sorted_insert(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut placed = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let cur = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if not placed
      if v < cur
        result = list.push(result, v)
        placed = true
      else if v == cur
        placed = true
      end
    end
    result = list.push(result, cur)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not placed
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let combined = "#{line1} #{line2}"
  let nums = parse_ints(combined)
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = nums.len()
  while i < n
    let v = match nums.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    sorted = sorted_insert(sorted, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut output = ""
  mut j = 0
  let m = sorted.len()
  while j < m
    let v = match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      output = "#{v}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{v}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(output)
end
